renamePatterns.description: Rename CSS custom property definition. Updates the --name declaration and all var(--name) references across stylesheets.
Rename CSS custom property from a var() reference. Propagates the rename to the definition and all other references.
Rename CSS class selector. Updates the class name in CSS rules and optionally in HTML class attributes.
Rename CSS ID selector. Updates the ID name in CSS rules and optionally in HTML id attributes.
Rename @keyframes animation. Updates the keyframes name and all animation-name property references.
Rename animation name from a usage site. Propagates to the @keyframes definition and all other references.
Rename cascade layer. Updates the @layer declaration and all layer references including @import layer() assignments.
Rename @font-face font-family. Updates the font-face declaration and all font-family property references.
Rename @counter-style. Updates the counter style definition and all list-style-type references.

prepareRenamePatterns.description: Identifies a CSS custom property name (without the -- prefix) as a valid rename target.
Identifies a CSS class name (without the . prefix) as a valid rename target.
Identifies a CSS ID name (without the # prefix) as a valid rename target.
Identifies a @keyframes animation name as a valid rename target.
Identifies a cascade layer name as a valid rename target.
Identifies a @counter-style name as a valid rename target.
